title: Operations Executive
description:
Job Summary

If you enjoy working in a fast pace environment and the challenge of redefining what good service means to people, this position is for you. Join HipVan's operations and customer happiness team to help us improve and exceed our customers' expectations when they shop with us! In the process, learn how operations is managed for an online store, from inbound operations such as freight forwarding and receiving shipments, to outbound operations such as picking and packing, working with 3rd party couriers and managing our in-house delivery fleet. Most importantly, future team members must have a strong sense of dedication to our customers' happiness. This is a full-time position and opportunity to join a young and growing team.


Job Description

- Ensure daily operation happens smoothly on a day to day basis
- Managing and coordinating shipments between freight forwarders and/or our local suppliers
- Scheduling and monitoring daily delivery load
- Organising and maintaining warehouse and inventory accuracy and quality
- Ensuring operational efficiency and accuracy (product quality, pick & pack and delivery)
- Actively involved to improve operational processes to enhance productivity and efficiency
- Participate in organisational planning and strategy

Requirements

- Strong problem-solving skills to resolve unforeseen operational hiccups
- Proactive and farsighted planning skill to forecast problems and provide timely solutions
- Strong sense of dedication to meet customer expectation and the standard we set out to achieve
- Process-oriented and good attention for detail
- Ability to multi-task and have good time-management to meet operation deadlines
- Keen to learn and grow in a fast moving and versatile environment
- Highly organized and motivated, a team player and fast learner

postedCompany.description:
ABOUT HIPVAN 


HipVan's mission is to help the next generation of Singapore homewowners create unique homes that they love! As one of Singapore's pioneer home furnishings online brand, we do so by inspiring new homeowners with practical homestyling ideas, as well as a wide variety of unique, quality and well designed home furnishing products to make their dream homes a reality!   


Like other growth oriented start-ups, we offer a work hard, play hard environment where creativity and hard work trumps titles and hierarchies. As a small team (~50) of passionate individuals mostly in their 20s and 30s, our informal work culture celebrates creativity, prioritizes individual responsibilities, and suits self-motivated individuals looking to learn fast, act fast in order to accelerate their career. As a team member, you will be surrounded by colleagues who are equally driven and excited about our mission and your success.  


If our mission and work culture resonates with you, we would love to talk to you more about joining us!
postedCompany.name: HIPVAN PTE. LTD.
